experiences_professionnelles.description: Study and Design of projects using Solidworks and AutoCAD. development of aluminium profiles and accessories Finantial Estimation and Project Planning Definition, Management, and Follow-up of Specifications Maintaining constant communication between the engineering office and other departments within the company.

Spearheaded the design and development of mechanical parts while creating comprehensive assembly plans to optimize production efficiency using Solidworks and AutoCAD. Orchestrated and managed high-stakes projects by providing meticulously prepared materials, cost and time estimates, design specifications, and reports to ensure project success.

Formulated design plans for mechanical components and prepared assembly instructions for production using Solidworks and AutoCAD. Oversaw the manufacturing process of a stainless steel cutlery sorting machine.
